core_mechanism: a metric-free, reparameterization-invariant dynamical system defined on the projective space of rays (half-lines through the origin of a vector space), with the conjugate momentum encoded as a bivector spanning a 2-plane in the exterior algebra rather than as a tangent vector, so that scale/homogeneity is quotiented out and trajectories are unparameterized curves
brief_reason: The abstract builds a law of dynamics whose state is a ray in S(V) and whose impulsion is a bivector supported on a 2-plane containing that ray, yielding unparameterized projective trajectories with no metric in the axioms.
